rationale: Wave 1: S1 plugin-bundle-skeleton has no deps.
Wave 1: S5 music-source-applescript has no deps.
Produce manifest.json + placeholder icon PNGs.
All AA.S1.* verified or deferred to integrator.
Produce music_source.js with osascript spawning.
All AA.S5.* verified via behavior test with MUSIC_SOURCE_FIXTURE.
Wave 2: S2 depends on S1 (verified).

Wave 2: S3 depends on S1 (verified).

Wave 3: S4 depends on S2, S3, S5 — all verified.

All sections S1-S5 verified; assembling bundle.

Harness ran end-to-end against integrated bundle: 28/28 assertions passed including PNV.1.
Impact-analysis-v3 classified S1 salvageable: manifest needs OS->windows, +Nodejs, +CodePathWin, -CodePathMac, updated Description.
Rebuild manifest.json with Windows-only OS, Nodejs.Version='20', CodePathWin='plugin/main.js', no CodePathMac, updated Description.
manifest.json conforms to MCA.TDIPA.1-4 and AA.S1.* under v3 amendments. dev-003 logged: omitted GenerateProfilerData from Nodejs object.

Impact-analysis-v3 classified S5 stop_and_scrap_and_replace: AppleScript+osascript replaced with PowerShell+WinRT SMTC. Section name renamed music-source-applescript -> music-source-smtc; section.id 'S5' preserved for DAG stability.

Rebuild plugin/music_source.js using execFile('powershell.exe', ['-NoProfile','-NonInteractive','-ExecutionPolicy','Bypass','-Command', PS_SCRIPT], {timeout:4000, windowsHide:true}) with inline WinRT SMTC PowerShell snippet. Preserve C-S4-S5 surface and dev-002 MUSIC_SOURCE_FIXTURE shim verbatim.
AA.S5.1-4 all pass via fixture; 4 required SMTC literals present; uses child_process+powershell.exe; no 'osascript' string. dev-004 logged: array-of-strings PS escape pattern.
S1 manifest replacement + S5 music_source.js replacement + run.sh removal. S2/S3/S4 outputs preserved verbatim.

Bundle updated at output/integration/com.autobuilder.applemusic-nowplaying.sdPlugin/. All manifest paths resolve. run.sh reduced to inert vestige (could not physically delete in cowork sandbox; dev-005 logged). integration/manifest.json updated to reflect v3 file list with run.sh removed.

Impact-analysis-v3 classified S6 salvageable: spawn-mechanism literal 'osascript' -> 'powershell.exe', AA.S5.4 literals shift to SMTC list, harness spawn changes from sh run.sh to node main.js (matches Windows host CodePathWin+Nodejs.Version execution model).
Rebuild harness.js with v3 amendments; run against integrated bundle.

v3 harness: 33/33 assertions passed including PNV.1 (Bohemian Rhapsody / Queen captured as setFeedback frame). Adds explicit MCA records (TDIPA.4, TDIPD.1, TDIPD.2) and AA.S1.6 / AA.S1.2.no-mac alongside the original 28.
